title: Surabaya, East Java — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Surabaya, East Java: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Surabaya is a city in East Java with a population of 2,874,000. Indonesia’s second-largest city and East Java’s bustling port metropolis with a growing economy.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
